programme.title: Daktari 305
programme.desc: Daktari 305

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The old woman who runs the newsstand in Jonathans building is being blackmailed for a murder she may not have committed

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: While looking for a criminal Cagney and Lacey encounter a bounty hunter who is also looking for the same person Samuels tells him that after theyre done with him theyll send him back to where he jumped bail from But the man says its not good enough because his bail will end in a few days So they have to find him and contend with the bounty hunter as well

programme.title: Starsky 314
programme.desc: Starsky 314

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: String and Dom investigate a small town where a friend of theirs has disappeared What they discover there is a little fiefdom controlled by an unfriendly sheriff named Bogan who doesnt like outsiders in his domain When String starts poking around for his friend Bogan arrests him and sets him loose on an 80000 acre wildlife enclosure just outside the town There he becomes the game in a little hunt that just may cost him his life As if that isnt enough an attractive highway patrol deputy has also run afoul of the Sheriff and String and Dom must intervene before she becomes fodder for the sheriffs goons

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki is terrorized by two men looking for a cursed lantern taken from them that has the power to find buried treasure

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Reeling from the shootout Lou tracks down one of the culprits and enacts and elaborate plot of revenge with the help of Froy and Carlos

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy repo a car from an anger management meeting Froy suffers the consequences of taking on a violent rage-aholic

programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Munsters 201
programme.desc: Munsters 201

programme.title: Addams Family 130
programme.desc: Addams Family 130

programme.title: Addams Family 107
programme.desc: Addams Family 107

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa trades a date with Flora for a hound dog

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The Farmers Association is having its fall dance and Grandpa doesnt want to take Flora MacMichael until Little Luke tells him about the box supper that Flora is bringing

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A book salesman gives flower seeds to a woman whose husband is away from home He then covers her mouth with one of his hands as she tries to scream for help

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Micah and Lucas are escorting Stanley a prisoner across a vast area with no towns anywhere nearby After Stanley scares away the three horses Micah Lucas and Stanley start walking and walking and walking

programme.title: Gunsmoke S07E26 Durham Bull
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S07E26 Durham Bull

programme.title: Bonanza 321
programme.desc: Bonanza 321

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Investigating a series of mysterious tidal waves West and Gordon find a fanatical marine environmentalist

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An insurance salesman murders an obnoxious tycoon to get his seductive wife and his fortune but later is blackmailed by a rival

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Amateur ventriloquist Billy Goldman learns that being a ventriloquist might not be the best career for him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When an Ambassador is the prime suspect in a murder investigation Nick ignores his orders and wrongly accuses the powerful politician

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki is terrorized by two men looking for a cursed lantern taken from them that has the power to find buried treasure

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways are scared that a group of gangsters are on the island but it turns out just to be a parrot who also squawks wildly when he hears the words boat and jewel

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is forced to become the Howells house-boy when the Skipper loses a bet to Mr Howell in a turtle actually a tortoise race

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Envious Grandpa attempts to sabotage a camping trip arranged by Hank Johnson a generous neighbor who has become increasingly popular with Little Luke and his friends

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL sends 86 and 99 into a circus to look for a smuggling operation

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The CONTROL agents are trapped on a KAOS island

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ befriends a woman who is suspected of being a witch by the people from the town in which she lives They have to deal with a plot to get rid of her that is hatched by the supersticious locals

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence leads Carol to suspect that Wilbur is seeing another woman

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Masquerading as German workers Hogan and the crew have made elaborate and foolproof plans to blow a German cannon factory sky-high - but their plan backfires when Newkirk winds up being drafted into the German army

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When an important Third Reich official wants to defect Hogan brings him to Stalag 13 - and convinces Col Klink that the fugitive is Adolf Hitler in disguisewho is trying to elude assassins by hiding at the camp

programme.title: Mchale 407
programme.desc: Mchale 407

programme.title: Mchale 410
programme.desc: Mchale 410

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers favorite actress visits the base

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood receives a telegraph to say his cousin Readith who bullied him as a child is returning to Evebing Shade

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Mike Logan hires Dan to find his daughter Jennys rapist Bella discovers that the serial rapist targets slender blondes in their late teens When the rapist kills a victim Jenny becomes a witness and Bea becomes a decoy

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Scalped stolen opera tickets land Jonathan in the middle of a plot to assassinate the DA who is fighting organized crime

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael is lost when Stephanie goes away for the weekend He goes to a Beaver Lodge dinner with George and is the life of the party

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: When a 16 year old guest at the Stratford develops a crush on her Joanna has a hard time turning him down

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Elizabeth tries to talk MacGillis into letting her cater the private party General Craig is throwing for visiting Gen Louis H Wilson but Polly and the Major are worried they will have to bail her out as usual

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Several members of a 1970s surfing rock band die during a reunion at the beach and Mitch investigates Meanwhile Donna is tricked into jumping off a bridge and spends the night in the water where she is rescued by two men carrying out a mysterious mission

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Cult It Out Lou

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Reeling from the shootout Lou tracks down one of the culprits and enacts and elaborate plot of revenge with the help of Froy and Carlos

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Hercules 204
programme.desc: Hercules 204

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of DC Liam recovers the probe but he Augur and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing encounters Falco who has come to kill Dr Arcane for turning him from a bird into a man

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A vessel of alien pacifists bound for Earth lands on the moon They are greeted as friends by all- except Commissioner Simmons who sees their vessel as way to return home

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A school teacher claims to have killed a bank robber The townspeople want to celebrate their new hero It all starts to unravel as his past catches up with him and the people hes lived with want nothing else to do with him

programme.title: Young 303
programme.desc: Young 303

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A young patient from a psychiatric home tells the police that an elderly patient at the facility was murdered After the young man is found dead himself Steve decides to feign mental illness to gain admittance to the place fearing that someone may be killing patients

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a replica American town are being used themselves as the unknowing carriers of a deadly plague The IM force must stop this from happening and bring the party responsible forward

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble returns to his hometown where he reunites with his father John and his loving sister Donna who absolutely believe in his innocence but Kimbles brother Ray has serious doubts about him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is called to Washington DC to take on a special task for the Army He is to take the place of married actorsingerdancer Jim Thornton Merritt who is working with two others to raise money to resurrect the Confederacy

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: Battletruck
programme.desc: Post World War III futuristic tale of collapsed governments bankrupt countries heralding a new lawless age

programme.title: Exterminators Of The Year 3000
programme.desc: In the year 3000 the Earth has been rendered a desert by nuclear war A group of survivors goes in search of rare and valuable water but standing in their way are the evil Exterminators who live only to cause pain and misery

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: With a few clues and a little conjuring Gillian produces a map showing the destination of the original Lightning League that disappeared years ago In a far off place untouched by Saw Boss Jayce is disgusted to find them playing war games

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The powerful liberty stone protects Aloar from all invaders by creating the spidereen whirlpool Gillian brings the league to this planet to see his old magician friend Axilar and to use the stone to seek Audrics whereabouts

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM plans to steal currency from the Philadelphia Mint using a gravity ray which can melt anything in their path and also produce impenetrable crystal armor for their vehicles

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals a seemingly worthless painting from a home in Rio De Janeiro Matt Trakker calls in the MASK team after learning the painting may contain a secret map to lost Nazi treasure

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Link and Zelda help the N team in building a mechanical dragon the purpose of which is to help them sneak in Dragons Den and put a stop to Dragonlords evil plan of hatching a deadly golden dragon

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Pit is heading for disappointment from his TV hero after he decides to aid him versus Mother Brain

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.desc: Quimbys new super computer replaces Gadget leaving him to pursue an alternative career
